_comment: Tracked leaders for the daily Leadership Watch (backend/leadership_watch.py). Editable: this file is git-synced into /data on first run; edit it there. company_subject_slug should match a wiki/subjects/<slug>.md where one exists. PHOTO OVERRIDE: set `photo` to a direct image URL (downloaded + stored once) or a "/leaders/<file>" path (drop the file in frontend-react/public/leaders/); it wins over auto-resolution. null = auto (article lead image → Wikimedia → initials). wikipedia_title seeds the Wikimedia photo lookup; null = look up by name. x_handle is best-effort tweet-reading only (gated by X_API_BEARER_TOKEN) and is NOT used for photos.

leaders.name: Kunal Shah
leaders.rationale: Premium cards + UPI + rewards mindshare — the closest analogue to Scapia's affluent-spender play.

leaders.name: Sashidhar Jagdishan
leaders.rationale: Runs India's largest card issuer (Infinia/DCB) — sets the premium-card benchmark Scapia competes against.

leaders.name: Amitabh Chaudhry
leaders.rationale: Issuer of Axis Atlas — the miles-led travel card most directly cross-shopped with Scapia.

leaders.name: Sandeep Bakhshi
leaders.rationale: Emeralde + a deep co-brand book; a bellwether for premium-card economics and lounge policy.

leaders.name: V. Vaidyanathan
leaders.rationale: Zero-forex premium cards (Mayura/WOW!) — directly attacks Scapia's zero-markup positioning.

leaders.name: Dilip Asbe
leaders.rationale: Owns UPI rails and credit-on-UPI policy — shapes whether cards or UPI win the spend.

leaders.name: Sanjay Malhotra
leaders.rationale: RBI direction on co-brand norms, MDR and credit-on-UPI is existential for the card's economics.

leaders.name: Harshil Mathur
leaders.rationale: Payments-stack vantage point on where transaction value and credit are flowing.

leaders.name: Vinay Bagri
leaders.rationale: Zero-forex travel neobank for young travellers — Scapia's nearest neobank competitor.

leaders.name: Jitendra Gupta
leaders.rationale: Neobank turning into a lender — a read on the digital-first spend+credit bundle.

leaders.name: Anurag Sinha
leaders.rationale: Metal-card neobank competing on app UX and lifetime-free — Scapia's design-led rival.

leaders.name: Rajan Bajaj
leaders.rationale: Card-to-bank merger play; young-spender acquisition Scapia also targets.

leaders.name: Rajesh Magow
leaders.rationale: Runs India's largest OTA — the booking surface and loyalty layer Scapia's travel store competes with.

leaders.name: Deep Kalra
leaders.rationale: Sets MMT's long-game on payments + travel bundling; frequent public strategy commentary.

leaders.name: Aloke Bajpai
leaders.rationale: ixigo's AU co-brand card is the closest direct travel-card co-brand to Scapia.

leaders.name: Nishant Pitti
leaders.rationale: Aggressive OTA pricing + fintech moves; a signal on travel-distribution margins.

leaders.name: Glenn Fogel
leaders.rationale: Global OTA leader — connected-trip and fintech-in-travel direction that reaches India.

leaders.name: Ariane Gorin
leaders.rationale: Sets global OTA loyalty + B2B travel-tech trends relevant to Scapia's store.

leaders.name: Sam Altman
leaders.rationale: AI roadmap reshapes product, support and personalization across every fintech/travel rival.

leaders.name: Campbell Wilson
leaders.rationale: Loyalty (Maharaja Club) + co-brand partnerships are a travel-rewards lever Scapia tracks.

leaders.name: Pieter Elbers
leaders.rationale: India's largest carrier launching loyalty + co-brand — direct to the flights-rewards battleground.

leaders.name: Nikhil Kamath
leaders.rationale: Prominent fintech investor/commentator — early read on where capital and consumer-finance bets are going.

leaders.name: Sumit Gwalani
leaders.rationale: Affluent-millennial neobank with a spends+rewards focus overlapping Scapia's base.

leaders.name: Sujith Narayanan
leaders.rationale: Drives Fi's credit + rewards expansion — a direct read on the digital-first spend bundle.
